/usr/bin/ar qc libbitserial_sim_core.a CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/Accelerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/BenchmarkSuite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/ConvLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/Lane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/MNISTReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/PEGroup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/ReferenceConv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/Task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/WeightBroadcaster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bitserial_sim_core.dir/src/WorkQueue.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbitserial_sim_core.a
